summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Smart Reminders and Hot Lead Detection features. All 15 backend tests PASSED. Frontend testing verified bell icon appears for hot leads and disappears after advisor assignment.
critical_code_review_comments: 1. REMINDER_TEMPLATES_BY_STAGE dict properly maps funnel stages to appropriate messages
2. cliente_nuevo/cliente_activo stages get post-sale support messages (not product mentions)
3. interesado/en_negociacion stages get product re-engagement messages with {producto} placeholder
4. nuevo stage gets general greeting messages
6. Reminder messages are stored in chat_messages with source='reminder'
Hot lead detection implementation is correct:
1. When lead reaches en_negociacion or cliente_nuevo via bot conversation, needs_advisor=True is set
2. hot_lead notification is created for admin with lead details
4. PUT /api/leads/{id}/assign sets needs_advisor=False when advisor is assigned
1. SessionItem shows bell icon (data-testid='hot-bell-*') when needs_advisor=true
2. Header shows bell (data-testid='hot-lead-header-bell') when viewing hot lead
4. CSS animation 'hot-lead-bell' provides subtle pulsing effect
seed_data_creation: Test leads created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart reminders and hot lead detection fully tested. Key verified features: 1) POST /api/reminders creates reminders with or without message_template, 2) POST /api/reminders/{id}/execute sends stage-appropriate messages stored with source=reminder, 3) Hot lead detection triggers when lead stage changes to en_negociacion/cliente_nuevo via bot conversation, 4) needs_advisor=True is set and hot_lead notification created, 5) GET /api/chat/sessions returns needs_advisor flag, 6) PUT /api/leads/{id}/assign clears needs_advisor, 7) Frontend bell icon appears in sidebar and header for hot leads, 8) Bell disappears after advisor assignment. Test advisor 'Carlos Mendez' exists and can be used for assignment tests.

smart_reminders.create_without_template: PASS - POST /api/reminders creates reminder in smart mode
smart_reminders.templates_by_stage: PASS - All funnel stages have appropriate templates

hot_lead_detection.notification_created: PASS - hot_lead notification created for admin
hot_lead_detection.unassign_advisor: PASS - Can unassign advisor by setting empty advisor_id

frontend_bell.sidebar_bell: PASS - Bell icon visible in SessionItem for hot leads
frontend_bell.header_bell: PASS - Header bell visible when viewing hot lead
frontend_bell.bell_disappears: PASS - Bell removed after assigning advisor
frontend_bell.css_animation: PASS - hot-lead-bell class provides pulsing animation
